items.name: Build Your Own Donair
items.description: Each bite is juicy, packed with flavor, and offers an array of fresh toppings like crunchy lettuce, zesty onions, and tangy pickles. The sweetness of their special sauces balances the savory meat perfectly.
items.simplified_description: A customizable donair with fresh toppings and special sauces.

items.name: Beef Donair
items.description: Loved the large beef donair with garlic, sweet, and hot sauce. The lettuce, onions, pickles, and peppers were fresh and delicious.
items.simplified_description: A large beef donair with garlic and sauces, served with fresh vegetables.

items.name: Donair Spring Roll Poutine
items.description: A creative fusion that features chopped donair spring rolls generously served atop a bed of poutine, all finished with a drizzle of sweet sauce. Diners have labeled it the best donair poutine in the city, and it’s hard to argue against such rave reviews.
items.simplified_description: Poutine topped with donair spring rolls and sweet sauce.

items.name: Petit Four Cookies
items.description: Indulge in a box of popular PetitFour cookies.
items.simplified_description: A box of popular small cookies.

items.name: Baklava
items.description: Savor the rich, buttery layers of baklava. Baklava is a sweet pastry made of layers of filo filled with nuts and sweetened with honey or syrup.
items.simplified_description: A sweet pastry made of layers of filo dough with nuts and honey.
